title: Device Home Screen - Connecting multiple headsets
scenario: Verify that when multiple headsets are paired and connected, all connected devices are properly displayed on the device home page with navigation dots and swipe functionality.
steps: Pair and connect multiple headsets to the system.
Navigate to the device home page.
Observe the displayed devices on the home page.
Check the dots at the bottom of the screen to see the number of connected devices and which device is currently displayed.
Swipe left to navigate to the next connected device.
Swipe right to navigate to the previous connected device.
expected: All connected devices are properly displayed on the device home page. Dots at the bottom indicate the number of connected devices and which device is currently displayed. The user can swipe left or right to navigate between connected devices.
